calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement Termination Of Trust And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Yoshitake for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it read the petition and the settlement agreement. Mr. Yoshitake stated that he has nothing further to add, that it is fairly common to terminate a Trust and that there are code provisions, but he did not have that information with him. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement, Termination of Trust and Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
